markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Dimmo and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, content creation, and product page optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Integration pages as a topic cluster may not be effective due to low search volume and difficulty ranking against established brands](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Focus on enriching product pages with comprehensive, well-structured content to improve indexing and avoid duplicate content issues](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Prioritize creating content for sales-related tools and categories, aligning with Dimmo's current focus](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Experiment with adding content to podcast pages to improve indexing and potentially boost rankings](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)

## Topics

### Integration Pages Strategy

  - [26,000 integration pages by ZPL generate only \~18,000 organic visits](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Difficult to rank for integration-related keywords due to brand dominance (e.g., HubSpot, QuickBooks)](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Strategy shift: focus on companies without specific integration info, prioritizing sales-related tools](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

### Product Categorization and Data

  - [Troy to provide CSV of sales companies, including subcategories (by end of day)](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Subcategory accuracy may vary due to companies claiming multiple functionalities](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Data will help refine content strategy and avoid hygiene mistakes in company listings](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)

### Product Page Optimization

  - [Current issue: Duplicate content between product pages and blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Solution: Enrich product pages with comprehensive info (features, benefits, use cases, customers)](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Design consideration: Use accordions or hidden content sections to manage information density](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Goal: Single, authoritative page per product to improve indexing and ranking](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)

### AI-Powered Product Recommendations

  - [Planned feature: Floating "Gino head" for personalized tool recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [User inputs: Company size, role, challenges, tech stack](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [Challenge: Ensuring recommendation accuracy with limited data](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
  - [Approach: Aim for directionally correct suggestions, acknowledging imperfect accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)

### Podcast Page Indexing

  - [Issue: Lack of content preventing indexing](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [Experiment: Add content (transcripts, summaries) to 10-20 podcast pages](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
  - [Monitor indexing and ranking improvements before scaling to more pages](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)

### Content Publishing and CMS Access

  - [Prateek to publish approved article and submit revisions for two others](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [15 new sales-related pages identified for creation (e.g., sales demo software, analytics)](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)
  - [GrowthX team to receive CMS (Shappi) access for content management](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Troy to send CSV of sales companies with categories by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Troy to investigate transcript availability and send to Prateek (today/tomorrow)](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - Provide CMS (Shappi) access to <team@growthlabs.com>
  - [Troy to create document outlining desired product page content structure](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Experiment with adding content to 10-20 podcast pages](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
  - [GrowthX to publish approved article and submit revisions for two others](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [Begin work on 15 new sales-related content pages](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)
  - [Hold off on review page updates until product page template is finalized](https://fathom.video/share/tRFbSWy8zGZHUiRDJz6ySHgFGwJFyzoM?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
